hero.title: The complete solution to manage your school
hero.subtitle: OmniSchool centralizes all school management in a single platform — Administration, Teachers, Parents and Students.

bookDemo.title: Ready to transform your school?
bookDemo.subtitle: Book a free demo and discover how OmniSchool can simplify your school management.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.description: Manage your entire school from a centralized dashboard. Students, teachers, finance, and scheduling.

teacher.title: Teacher app
teacher.description: Smart attendance, grades, homework and syllabus — everything a teacher needs on mobile.

parent.title: Parent app
parent.description: Follow your child's schooling in real time. Grades, absences, and school updates.

values.title: Digital Processes for the Entire School
values.subtitle: A complete platform that supports students, parents, teachers and administration — at every stage of school life.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: School management shouldn't be complicated. OmniSchool is designed to be intuitive and easy to use, so teachers and administrators can focus on education rather than technology.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Accessible information shared between all stakeholders, in real time.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Modern tools to simplify planning, improve communication, and automate processes.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Security, privacy, and role-based access control to protect the school's data.

adminOverview.label: FOR ADMINISTRATORS
adminOverview.title: All School Management in One Place
adminOverview.description: Well-designed digital school processes are the foundation of an efficient school. OmniSchool centralizes everything your team needs — students, finance, timetables and communication — in a simple and powerful platform.

assistantOverview.label: FOR ASSISTANTS
assistantOverview.title: All Administration in One Place
assistantOverview.p1: OmniSchool is a true assistant for administrative teams. Manage all school processes from a centralized space — enrollment, finance, timetables and communication.
assistantOverview.p2: With student management, teacher management and planning modules, OmniSchool enables smoother workflows, saving time and resources.
assistantOverview.p3: OmniSchool also provides higher accuracy in data management, creating a reliable and unified information base for all administrative decisions.

solutionHero.title: Digital Processes for the Entire School
solutionHero.subtitle: A complete platform that supports students, parents, teachers and administration — at every stage of school life.

userRoles.title: Built for every user
userRoles.subtitle: OmniSchool adapts to every role in the school. Principal, assistant, teacher or parent — each user gets a space designed for their specific needs.
